title: 2020-2024 Batch Placements
content: 2020-2024 Batch Placements Placement Highlights-JUIT Solan B.Tech–2024 6.81 LPA Mean Salary 6.5 LPA Median Salary 21.15 LPA Highest Salary by ZS Associates 20.0 LPA 2nd Highest Salary by Amazon 19.5 LPA 3rd Highest Salary by Zscaler 17.0 LPA 4th Highest Salary by Nference 16.3 LPA 5th Highest Salary by DarwinBox PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT Solan 2020-24 as on 20/02/2025 PLACEMENT STATUS : JUIT, SOLAN 2020-24 Branch Total Eligible Participating Students No. of Absolute Offers % of Absolute Offers No. of Total Offers % of Total Offers CSE 257 225 88% 248 96% ECE 12 12 100% 12 100% IT 39 34 87% 36 92% BT/BI 10 10 100% 11 110% CIVIL 7 4 57% 4 57% Total 325 285 88% 311 96% Key Recruiters: Amazon Nference DrawinBox Click Labs Infosys TT Consultants Cogizant Kony Labs UniMrkt Coviam Technologies Kuliza Wep Digital Edoofa Kwench Wipro Ericsson Nineleaps Yamaha Motor Sol FICO NTT Data ZS Associates Gemalto Decision Point Zscaler Genpact Root Analysis Zycus Grappus RTDS Zyla Healthcare Hackwithinfi Sap labs IDS Infotech Hashdin SRM Contractors Eckovation HCL Stellarix Consultancy Extramarks India Lends The Smart Cube Collagedunia IndiaMart TresVista Ultratech Mountblue Bright Petroleum Growman Research Group Note:- Significant number of students who have opted for higher studies in India and abroad through GATE and other competitive examinations are removed from the list of total eligible students. For any query please write to pankaj.kumar@juit.ac.in
